headline: Are Visa and Mastercard vulnerable to AI shopping agents?
summary: Investing.com -- Concerns that Ai could weaken the role of card networks such as Visa and Mastercard are growing, though the risk to their long-term business models remains uncertain, according to analysts at Evercore.

headline: BofA sees card networks as safest bets, bullish on Visa & Mastercard
